description: Fast input reading from stdin using sys.stdin.read.

description: Read a single integer from standard input.

label: Read Array
description: Read a line of space-separated integers into a list.

code:

grid = [list(map(int, input().split())) for _ in range(r)]
label: Read Matrix
description: Read dimensions R and C, followed by R lines of integers into a grid.

description: Sort list in-place in ascending order.

description: Sort list in-place in descending order.

description: Binary search index of target using bisect_left.

BFS

code:
from collections import defaultdict

label: Default Dictionary
description: Initialize a defaultdict with default int values.

code:
from collections import Counter
freq = Counter(a)
label: Counter
description: Count frequencies of elements in list using Counter.

code:
import heapq
heapq.heapify(a)
heapq.heappush(a, val)
min_val = heapq.heappop(a)
label: Min Heap
description: Min heap operations using heapq module.

code:
import heapq
# Python heapq is min-heap by default; negate values for max-heap
a = [-x for x in original_list]
heapq.heapify(a)
heapq.heappush(a, -val)
max_val = -heapq.heappop(a)
label: Max Heap
description: Max heap implementation by negating elements using heapq.

code:
import math
g = math.gcd(a, b)
l = (a * b) // g
label: GCD & LCM
description: Calculate Greatest Common Divisor and Least Common Multiple.
